import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let trimmed = string.trim(line)
    match string.parse_int(trimmed)
    when Some(n)
      mut a = 0
      mut b = 1
      mut i = 0
      while i < n
        let t = a + b
        a = b
        b = t
        i = i + 1
      end
      print("fib=#{a}")
    when None
      print("fib=0")
    end
  when None
    print("fib=0")
  end
end
